spec_match.rationale: Correct usage of env(safe-printable-inset) in print stylesheets inside @page and regular element layouts.

interactive.rationale: Features a prominent 'Print this page' trigger that invokes the browser's native print preview dialog—the actual runtime context of the CSS media rule.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Clean explanation showing how the environment variable protects text content from physical print heads.

edge_cases.rationale: Demonstrates both multi-argument CSS env variables (providing a 1cm screen fallback) and normal print query blocks.

references.rationale: Correctly references the central ChromeStatus entry and linked CSSWG tracking issue.

design_system.rationale: Uses beautiful, accessible hatches and dashed boundaries to simulate paper sheets.

summary: The safe-print-layout is a clean visual paper simulator. While simple, its direct button hook to window.print() lets developers natively test browser CSS print engine parameters.
